channel.title: Theme on Williams Orellana
channel.description: Recent content in Theme on Williams Orellana

item.title: New theme
item.description: It’s been a long time since the last post, but now I want to write, but not just that, I want to change the look on the blog. With that in mind, I had started to look for a minimalist theme and then customized to fit my needs, I have to say that the result is looking great (at least from my point of view) The theme is Pickles using Hugo engine as static site generator, as I said before the look and feel is what I was looking for, so it will pass some time before I decide to change the theme again, hopefully the blog will have more post than this time 😁
